name: !Sonic RPG!
description:
YEAH! SONIC!

Hello everyone! How are ya'll doing :3

This is my first sonic bot! might make more later on. This doesn't have a set scenario, so you have to make your own. If you want a character to stop talking, just say they left or aren't there. Also, in this, Amy and Blaze are a couple because why not.

Have a good day ppl! <3
creator: Verali♥️♥️
